description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 4 security-review cluster. Pins security review of a diff apart from general code review, migration review, supply-chain review, and SAST triage. Includes discrimination against the shipped code-reviewer.

cases.prompt: Give this PR a security review — I care about authz, tenant isolation, and injection, not style.
cases.reason: Security-specialized review of an actual diff with exploit-path-gated findings.

cases.prompt: Review this PR overall — correctness, readability, performance, and tests.
cases.reason: General multi-axis code review, not the security-only lens.

cases.prompt: This PR is a database migration — check it's safe to deploy (grants, drops, policy changes, lock time).
cases.reason: Migration deploy-safety is its own skill; the RLS/policy part can be delegated to rls-policy-auditor.

cases.prompt: Here's a SARIF file from our scanner on this branch — triage the findings.
cases.reason: Triaging scanner output is static-analysis-reviewer; security-pr-reviewer reviews the diff itself.
